_legend: questions plausible; answers dummy (some grounded in real facts). Verify before real use.
heading: Frequently Asked Questions

items.q: How do I contact the Student Affairs Office?
items.a: Use the contact form on this site, email studentaffairs@iitp.ac.in, or visit the SAO desk in the Administrative Block during office hours (Mon–Fri, 9:30 AM–5:30 PM). (Placeholder details.)

items.q: Where will I stay on campus?
items.a: IIT Patna provides on-campus hostels — boys' hostels across four blocks and a girls' hostel across two blocks, currently housing 1500+ students, with reading rooms, gyms, dining halls and 24-hour Wi-Fi.

items.q: How do I apply for a scholarship or financial assistance?
items.a: Visit Resources & Support for scholarship guidance, or contact the SAO for merit/need-based and emergency aid options. (Placeholder.)

items.q: What is the policy on ragging?
items.a: IIT Patna has a zero-tolerance policy. Ragging is banned and punishable per Supreme Court guidelines; offenders face disciplinary and legal action.

items.q: How do I get counselling support?
items.a: Confidential counselling is available through the wellness team and CCDC. Request an appointment via the contact form; urgent help is listed under Emergency Contacts.

items.q: What clubs and fests can I join?
items.a: Technical clubs (Robotics, E-Cell, Finance, Design, Trading, Technical) and cultural clubs (Yavanika drama, Aria music, Exousia dance), plus fests Anwesha, Celesta and Infinito.

items.q: How do I raise a grievance?
items.a: Use the grievance form under Resources, or contact the relevant cell (ICC/WGRC, SC/ST/OBC). All grievances are handled confidentially and fairly. (Process is a placeholder.)
